title: TANUVAS Notification 2026 - Apply for Project Assistant Posts
description: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of various Project Assistant Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation, M.E/ M.Tech, M.Sc, can grab this chance and apply for the TANUVAS Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by the last date...
